name: ballRecovery
description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

name: blockedShots
description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

name: defensiveInterventions
description: The sum of ball recoveries, won tackles, effective clearances, outfielder blocks, blocked crosses, and defensive third duels won.

name: effectiveClearance
description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

name: effectiveTackles
description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

name: inneffectiveTackles
description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

name: interceptions
description: The number of interceptions.

name: outfielderBlock
description: Defender blocks a shot

name: possWonAtt3rd
description: Total number of times possession was regained in the attacking third of the field

name: possWonDef3rd
description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

name: possWonMid3rd
description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

name: tacklePct
description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

name: timesTackled
description: The total number of times a player has been tackled.

name: totalClearance
description: The number of clearances attempted.

name: totalTackles
description: The number of tackles attempted.

name: aerialDuelPct
description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

name: aerialsLost
description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

name: aerialsWon
description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

name: appearances
description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

name: avgRatingFromEditor
description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

name: avgRatingFromUser
description: The average user rating for a player.

name: dnp
description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

name: draws
description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

name: duelWinPct
description: The percentage of duels won.

name: duels
description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

name: duelsLost
description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

name: duelsWon
description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

name: foulsCommitted
description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

name: foulsSuffered
description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

name: goalDifference
description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

name: groundDuels
description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

name: groundDuelsWon
description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

name: handBalls
description: The number of handball fouls committed..

name: losses
description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

name: lostCorners
description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

name: minutes
description: The number of minutes played by a player.

name: ownGoals
description: The number of own goals conceded.

name: passPct
description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

name: redCards
description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

name: starts
description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

name: subIns
description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

name: subOuts
description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

name: suspensions
description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

name: timeEnded
description: The time a match ends.

name: timeStarted
description: The time a match starts.

name: totalContest
description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

name: touches
description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

name: turnover
description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

name: winPct
description: The percentage of matches won.

name: wins
description: The number of matches won.

name: wonContest
description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

name: wonCorners
description: The number of corners won.

name: yellowCards
description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

name: accurateKeeperSweeper
description: Goalkeeper comes off their line, wins the ball and wins possession for their team

name: bigChanceSaves
description: Count of major scoring chances saved by the player (usually goalkeepers)

name: cleanSheet
description: The number of times a goalkeeper doesn't let in a goal.

name: crossesCaught
description: The number of crosses claimed.

name: expectedGoalsConceded
description: Total Expected Goals Against

name: expectedGoalsNonPenaltyConceded
description: Total Expected Goals Against excluding penalties

name: expectedGoalsOnTargetConceded
description: Total Expected Goals on Target Against

name: expectedGoalsOnTargetNonPenaltyConceded
description: Total Expected Goals on Target Against excluding penalties

name: expectedGoalsPrevented
description: The difference between expected goals on target (xGOT) conceded and actual goals conceded by a goalkeeper.

name: goalsConceded
description: The number of goals allowed by the goalkeeper.

name: goalsPrevented
description: The difference between goals on target and actual goals conceded by a goalkeeper.

name: goodHighClaim
description: Goalkeeper catches a cross

name: partialCleenSheet
description: The number of times a clean sheet is kept when playing at least a part of the game.

name: penaltyKickConceded
description: The number of goals allowed when the opposing team take a penalty.

name: penaltyKickSavePct
description: The percentage of penalty kicks a goalkeeper saves.

name: penaltyKicksFaced
description: The number of penalty kicks faced by a goalkeeper.

name: penaltyKicksSaved
description: The number of penalty kicks saved by a goalkeeper.

name: punches
description: The number of punches.

name: savePct
description: The percentage of shots on target that are saved by a goalkeeper.

name: saves
description: The number of times a goalkeeper makes a save.

name: shootOutKicksFaced
description: The number of penalty kicks faced in a penalty shootout.

name: shootOutKicksSaved
description: The number of penalty kicks saved in a penalty shootout.

name: shootOutSavePct
description: The percentage of penalty kicks saved in a penalty shootout.

name: shotsFaced
description: The number of shots on target a goalkeeper has faced.

name: shotsOnGoalAgainst
description: The number of shots on goal the opposing team has had against this team

name: smothers
description: The number of smothers.

name: totalKeeperSweeper
description: Goalkeeper attempts to come off their line and win possession of the ball

name: unclaimedCrosses
description: The number of crosses that were unclaimed.

name: accurateCrosses
description: The number of crosses that find their target.

name: accurateLongBalls
description: The number of longballs that are completed.

name: accuratePasses
description: The number of passes completed.

name: accurateThroughBalls
description: The number of through balls that find their target.

name: attemptsInBox
description: The number of attempts from in the box.

name: attemptsOutBox
description: The number of attempts from out of the box.

name: bigChanceCreated
description: A pass which led to a clear-cut scoring opportunity, such as a one-on-one situation or a shot from just a few yards out

name: bigChanceMissed
description: A clear-cut scoring opportunity which was not converted/scored

name: crossPct
description: The percentage of crosses that find their target.

name: expectedAssists
description: Total Expected Assists

name: expectedAssistsOpenPlay
description: Total Expected Assists from open play

name: expectedAssistsSetPlay
description: Total Expected Assists from set pieces

name: expectedGoals
description: Total expected goals

name: expectedGoalsFreeKick
description: Total Expected Goals of all free kick shots

name: expectedGoalsNonPenalty
description: Total Expected Goals excluding penalties

name: expectedGoalsOnTarget
description: Total Expected Goals on Target

name: expectedGoalsOnTargetFreeKick
description: Total Expected Goals on Target from free kick shots

name: expectedGoalsOnTargetNonPenalty
description: Total Expected Goals on Target excluding penalties

name: expectedGoalsOpenPlay
description: Total Expected Goals of all open play shots

name: expectedGoalsSetPlay
description: Total Expected Goals of all set play shots

name: finalThirdEntries
description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

name: freeKickGoals
description: The number goals scored from free kick shots.

name: freeKickPct
description: The percentage of free kick shots that .

name: freeKickShots
description: The number of free kick shots attempted.

name: gameWinningAssists
description: The number of game winning assists.

name: gameWinningGoals
description: The number of game winning goals.

name: goalAssists
description: The number of assists.

name: headedGoals
description: The number of goals scored from headers.

name: inaccurateCrosses
description: The number of times a cross was attempted and failed to find its target.

name: inaccurateLongBalls
description: The number of times a long ball was attempted and failed to be completed

name: inaccuratePasses
description: The number of times a pass was attempted and failed to find its target.

name: inaccurateThroughBalls
description: The number of times a through ball was attempted and failed to be completed.

name: leftFootedShots
description: The number of shots attempted with a player's left foot.

name: longballPct
description: The percentage of long balls attempted that find their target.

name: offsides
description: The number of times a player or team gets caught offside.

name: penAreaEntries
description: A pass where the ball moves from outside to inside the penalty area

name: penaltyKickGoals
description: The number of goals scored from the penalty spot.

name: penaltyKickPct
description: The percentage of penalty kicks converted.

name: penaltyKickShots
description: The number of penalty kicks attempted.

name: penaltyKicksMissed
description: The number of penalty kicks missed.

name: progressiveCarries
description: Carries that significantly move the ball toward the opponent’s goal

name: rightFootedShots
description: The number of shots attempted with the right foot.

name: secondAssists
description: The number of assists to the player who assisted a goal.

name: shootOutGoals
description: The number of penalty kicks converted in penalty shootouts.

name: shootOutMisses
description: The number of penalty kicks missed in penalty shootouts.

name: shootOutPct
description: The percentage of penalty kicks in a penalty shootout that are converted.

name: shotAssists
description: The number of passes that directly result in a shot.

name: shotPct
description: The percentage of shots that are on target.

name: shotsHeaded
description: The number of shots attempted with the head.

name: shotsOffTarget
description: The number shots attempted that miss the goal.

name: shotsOnPost
description: The number of shots that hit the post.

name: shotsOnTarget
description: The number of shots that are on goal.

name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

name: throughBallPct
description: The percentage of through balls played that find their target.

name: totalCrosses
description: The number of crosses attempted.

name: totalFinalThirdPasses
description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

name: totalGoals
description: The number of goals scored against the opposing team.

name: totalLongBalls
description: The number of long balls attempted.

name: totalPasses
description: The number of passes attempted.

name: totalShots
description: The number of shots attempted.

name: totalThroughBalls
description: The number of through balls attempted.

name: touchesInOppBox
description: Total touches inside the penalty area of the opposition
